use_cases: Displaying step-by-step onboarding or tutorial content with visual indicators
Feature highlights or process explanation cards in SaaS applications
Interactive walkthrough cards for educational or training platforms
Process documentation cards with animated visual aids
Feature announcement cards with engaging hover animations
ai_summary: An animated interactive card component featuring a file/folder SVG illustration with hover-based animations powered by Framer Motion. The card displays step information including a title, description, and animated icon, making it ideal for onboarding flows, tutorials, and process documentation in web applications. Supports custom icons via props.
